message:
feat(cli): add native E2E test runner command surface (br-8zmc)

Implements native E2E suite registry and runner:
- `am e2e list` - List available test suites with --json and -v flags
- `am e2e run` - Run suites with --include/--exclude patterns
- `am e2e show` - Show suite details

Features:
- Suite discovery from tests/e2e/test_*.sh with metadata extraction
- Deterministic alphabetical ordering
- Include/exclude glob pattern filtering
- Execution timing and pass/fail accounting
- Assertion count parsing from ANSI output
- JSON output for CI integration

Also closes br-2ynj (e2e_artifacts module already implemented).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
